name: Cinnamon Raisin French Toast with Date-Nut Butter
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large, shallow dish, beat together milk, buttermilk, eggs, granulated sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Soak bread slices in the egg mixture until the bread is soaked through but not falling apart.
3. Melt 2 tablespoons of unsalted butter in a large skillet over medium heat; add 4 bread slices and cook until crisp and golden brown on both sides, about 5 minutes. Remove and keep warm. Repeat with remaining butter and bread slices.
4. Serve with Date-Nut Butter and dust with powdered sugar. Makes 4 servings.
